findings.design_reference: FR-020 / NFR-001 / specs/198-beta2-hardening/data-model.md:99-114 / code-implementation and test-integrity lenses
findings.comment: The honesty checker does not parse the authoritative TrackerClaims shape. Get-ContinuousCoReviewStateClaims reads only Iteration Status and Last Completed Task, while the formal data model requires task_statuses and defines capacity/test-count claims; it also accepts any nonmatching Last Completed Task text and any [a-z-]+ status, then treats those unmapped claims as honest. A tracker-only edit can therefore add or alter unparsed capacity/test-count claims (or use an unknown task/status form) and retain stale review evidence, contradicting the required fail-closed behavior. Parse every claim-bearing field with canonical enums/shapes, compare it to accepted review/run evidence, and add abuse tests proving unmapped/invalid claims decline the bypass.
